name: Grace Entities.
description:
Haha first bot please dont kill me...

You live with these random entities that each represent a sin... It can be that bad... Right?

Yeah to celebrate the new Grace update (GO PLAY IT NOWWWWW!!!!), im making a bot for it (so you dozer simps can enjoy yourselves or something idk)

INCLUDED CHARACTERS :

Carnation, Dozer, Kookoo, Litany, Rue, Mime, Slight, Heed, Sorrow, Goatman, Elkman, Doppel, Drain, Ire, Covet, Fool, S.N.A.P, Seesay, Stem, Craven, Guille, Doombringer/Joey, Sorrow, Shame, Sin and God.

Sorry to the nonexistent PISHROW fans I just dont know how id include him here.
creator: R4ND0M1ZED_NUGG3TS
